description: Default parameters for RttmPool / RttmPoolFactory deployment (USDC 6 decimals). Override per network in pool.<chainId>.json.
comment_treasury_sepolia: Circle USDC on Ethereum Sepolia per https://developers.circle.com/stablecoins/usdc-contract-addresses
comment_dues_timing: 2592000 s = 30 days; monthly period and one-month kick grace after duesPaidUntil.
comment_bps: BPS denominator 10000; pass requires yesVotes * 10000 > supply * bps (strictly greater than bps/10000 of supply). 5000 => strictly more than 50%.
comment_minimums: 10_000_000 = 10 USDC (6 decimals) for memberMinimum, joinMinimum, and per-period duesAmount.
